caller_context.arc_paper_tool_notes: The controller has already collected bounded ARC paper context with arc-paper CLI/service calls. Treat this supplied context as read-only evidence. Do not invoke ARC CLIs, shell commands, or MCP tools from the worker. Use internet search only for uncached, recent, or non-arXiv public evidence. Record precise missing checks in the source domain, target domain, and their intersection so the controller can resolve them between worker rounds.
